title: Anchor accounts struct missing Signer<'info> on the authority account

provenance.note: Negative-path example: this Finding intentionally binds to a checker kind that does NOT exist in the vetted registry, so synth-prove routes it to drafts/ instead of auto-committing. This exercises the 'loop fails closed' contract from Phase 0 of PLAN-solana-deep-dive.md. Once Phase 2.5 lands a real Rust/Anchor checker family, this Finding becomes a viable candidate for promotion.
